problem: What limits adult neuroplasticity — can those limits be safely removed?
hypothesis: If BDNF upregulation to promote neurogenesis is applied to be, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: fMRI connectivity study with 17 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
